title: How do I set up and connect to VPN on iOS devices?
plain_text: A virtual private network (VPN) allows you to securely connect your computer to resources on the Northeastern University network. Many of the systems and services on the Northeastern University network require that you ensure a secure connection to gain access. While on campus, NUnet and NUwave automatically provide a secure connection to campus network resources, such as the Q: drive. If you are not connected to NUnet or NUwave, you will be required to use a VPN connection in addition to your internet connection to access many of Northeastern's systems and services. Requirements for VPN: Duo multi-factor authentication is required to access the VPN. For information on enrollment and usage of Duo, refer to the following articles: How do I enroll in Duo multi-factor authentication (MFA)? How do I use Duo multi-factor authentication (MFA)? Initial setup: Download and install the GlobalProtect app. Search the the App Store for GlobalProtect and install the app. Enter the portal address: After installing GlobalProtect, open the app. Enter vpn.northeastern.edu in the Address field and select the 'CONNECT' button. Add to configuration: A pop-up message will appear to ask for permission to add VPN configurations. Select 'Allow'. Note: You may be asked to enter your device password when giving permission. Sign in: Open the GlobalProtect app and select the 'Connect' button. The app will open your mobile browser to log in via SSO. Sign in with your Northeastern username and password. Accept the authentication request from the Duo app. If you do not accept the request within the Duo app, the connection will terminate. Select 'Open' when prompted to 'Open this page' in GlobalProtect. You will see the CONNECTED status. There will also be a VPN icon in the status bar at the top. You are now connected. Subsequent connection: After the initial setup on a device, you can connect to the VPN on this device easily. Open the GlobalProtect app. Select the grey shield icon. Note: You may be asked to enter your Northeastern username (without @northeastern.edu) and password. Accept the authentication request from the Duo app. You will see the CONNECTED status. There will also be a VPN icon in the status bar at the top. You are now connected. Disconnect VPN: Open the GlobalProtect app, and you will see a green shield icon suggesting you are connected. Select the shield icon to disconnect.
